title: Dao Feishan
content:
Dao Feishan
 is the Leader of the 
Dao Fei Clan
. He is a 
Spirit Void
 cultivator of the 
Outer Realm
.

Personality
[
]

He is a very vulgar, perverted and lascivious person as he not only likes women but also handsome men and will do anything to have his way with them before killing them.

History
[
]

He participated in the final battle of the Third Sealed-Outer Realm War in the 
Allheaven Star System
. During that time, he deliberately hunted 
Mu Bingmei
 due to her beauty and also due to the fact that she was involved with 
Wang Lin
.
